description: Smooth textured leather loafers from woodland for men with a refined, upraised heel. For the debonair who pushes the sartorial envelope as much as he can. Style this with flat front trousers, a tonal blazer and a crisp shirt. UpperLeather upper with reinforced overlaysSlip-on style with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearabilitySoft sockliner for instep comfortEmbossed branding on the lateral side of the midfootMidsoleShock absorbing EVA midsoleOutsoleTPR outsole with an upraised heel Geometric lugs on the outsole with a suction point at th heelshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not store in direct sunlight
